releases.name: Mermaid Fixer 1.1.3

releases.author: rosetta-guo-fyaic
releases.description:
## Mermaid Fixer 1.1.2

### Fixed
- Fix Mermaid `style ... %% comment` lines by moving inline comments onto their own Mermaid comment lines.
- Fix nested double quotes inside Mermaid subgraph titles and node labels.
- Avoid Mermaid C4 diagram keyword misdetection inside flowcharts by rewriting C4 diagram keywords to safe node identifiers.
- Prevent existing `subgraph ID ["Title"]`, quoted labels, and Mermaid syntax examples from being re-fixed on subsequent runs.

### Verification
- `npm run build`
- `npm test` (43 tests)
- `npm run lint`
- `node --check main.js`
- Mermaid CLI render check for the ecosystem concept-map regression
releases.name: Mermaid Fixer 1.1.2

releases.author: rosetta-guo-fyaic
releases.description:
Release hardening for Obsidian Community submission.

Changes:
- Shortened command palette names to avoid repeating the plugin name.
- Normalized vault skip paths with Obsidian normalizePath.
- Clarified that main.js is a GitHub release asset and should not be committed to the repository.
- Updated release and README docs for the 1.0.1 command names.

Release assets for Obsidian:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Mermaid Fixer 1.0.1

releases.author: rosetta-guo-fyaic
releases.description:
Initial public release of Mermaid Fixer for Obsidian.

Highlights:
- Fix common Mermaid syntax errors in the current note or across the whole vault.
- Preview diffs before applying changes.
- Enable or disable each fix rule independently.
- Free, local-only, no network requests, no telemetry.

Release assets for Obsidian:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Mermaid Fixer 1.0.0
